title: sophora tonkinensis var. polyphylla
intro: Sophora tonkinensis var. polyphylla, also known as Polyphylla Sophora or Kuan Dong Hua, is a plant species that is part of the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving cardiovascular health. Sophora tonkinensis var. polyphylla is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, extracts, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
